sources.description: Modal GPU Glossary — 73 precise technical definitions across 4 categories
NVIDIA CUDA Programming Guide — 5 parts, 20 chapters, full TOC extracted
CUDA C++ Best Practices Guide — 21 chapters
Hopper GPU Tuning Guide — TMA, Thread Block Clusters, HBM3, NVLink4
Ampere GPU Tuning Guide — async copy, arrive/wait barrier, TF32, HBM2e
cuBLAS API Reference — GEMM, batched GEMM, tensor core math modes
CUDA Math API — intrinsic math functions
Nsight Compute HTML — NOT PRESENT locally; referenced via llms.txt only
PTX ISA Reference — NOT PRESENT locally; referenced via llms.txt only
NVIDIA CUDA Samples — 115 samples across 5 categories
GPU Mode Lectures — 79 lectures, code in lecture_001/003/004/008/009/012/018
CUTLASS 4.4.1 — README, core abstractions, CuTe DSL, architecture support
llm.c GPT-2 CUDA training — 25 CUDA kernel files in dev/cuda/
FlashAttention 1/2/3/4 — README, hopper headers, FA4 CuTeDSL architecture
FlashAttention paper (Dao et al. 2022)

ingestionNotes: PDF files (5 papers, 2 books) could not be read: pdftoppm (poppler-utils) not installed. Install with: apt-get install poppler-utils. Papers referenced indirectly via FlashAttention README/code and CUTLASS README.
Nsight Compute HTML not present locally (only referenced in llms.txt). Nsight Compute section relies on GPU Mode Lecture 1/8 code and gpu-glossary/perf entries.
PTX ISA HTML not present locally. PTX concepts derived from gpu-glossary/device-software/parallel-thread-execution.md and gpu-glossary/host-software/nvcc.md.
CUTLASS docs/ directory contains generated HTML Doxygen — structure too dense for direct extraction; CUTLASS concepts extracted from README.md which is comprehensive.
All 73 GPU Glossary entries successfully read and used to populate concept definitions with precise technical language and verified key facts.
llm.c dev/cuda/ directory contains 25 CUDA kernel files providing real production patterns for: attention, matmul, softmax, layernorm, gelu, adamw, crossentropy, encoder, nccl all-reduce.
FlashAttention FA4 CLAUDE.md provided detailed architecture documentation for the most recent (CuTeDSL) implementation including SM100 2CTA patterns.
cuda-mode-lectures README documents 79 lectures. Only lecture directories with code files (001, 003, 004, 008, 009, 012, 018, 029, 036, 057) were directly useful.
